prompt: Trace how a Vite dev-server request for a JavaScript or CSS module moves from server setup through middleware, module transform, plugin hooks, graph update, and HTTP response.

expected_symbols.name: transformMiddleware
expected_symbols.why: Handles eligible module requests and calls transformRequest.

expected_symbols.name: transformRequest
expected_symbols.why: Coordinates resolving, loading, transforming, caching, and graph updates.

expected_symbols.name: createPluginContainer
expected_symbols.why: Builds the plugin hook runner used by request transforms.

expected_symbols.name: ModuleGraph
expected_symbols.why: Tracks module identity, dependencies, and transform results.

expected_claims.text: Dev-server creation installs the middleware stack that later receives module requests.
transformMiddleware filters module-like requests and delegates eligible work to transformRequest.
transformRequest uses the plugin container to resolve, load, and transform modules.
The module graph is updated with module entries and transform results during the request path.
The transformed code is sent back through the transform middleware response path.

forbidden_claims.text: JavaScript module requests bypass the dev-server middleware stack.
Plugin hooks are not involved in dev-server module transforms.
